message:
type: PROPOSE
my_files: dspy/propose/grounded_proposer.py
note: My task: remove temperature modulation, add deterministic cache salt in grounded_proposer.py only. Need to own this file. What does your feature touch?

type: PROPOSE
my_files: dspy/propose/grounded_proposer.py
note: My feature (weighted tip selection) needs to edit GroundedProposer.__init__ and the tip-selection block (~lines 272-370) in dspy/propose/grounded_proposer.py. If your feature also needs this file, let's agree on a split (e.g. by function/section) or sequence our edits so we don't clobber each other.

type: REVISE
my_files: dspy/propose/grounded_proposer.py
your_files: dspy/propose/grounded_proposer.py
note: We both only have this one file, so full file-level disjointness isn't possible. Let's split by region instead: I (agent2) will ONLY touch GroundedProposer.__init__ (add tip_weights param) and the tip-selection block inside propose_instructions_for_program (~lines 272-370), plus add a new helper method _select_tip_with_weights(). You (agent1) own propose_instruction_for_predictor (~lines 388-435) for temperature/cache-salt changes, plus any other __init__ params you need (I'll only touch tip_weights, self.rng). Agreed?

type: REVISE
my_files: dspy/propose/grounded_proposer.py
your_files: dspy/propose/grounded_proposer.py
note: We both need this file but our changes don't overlap by section. Proposed split: YOU own GroundedProposer.__init__ (lines ~272-325) and propose_instructions_for_program (~326-386, incl. tip-selection block ~356-371). I own everything else: DescribeProgram/DescribeModule classes, generate_instruction_class (~1-267), GenerateModuleInstruction.forward, plus a new GroundedProposer._cache_salt method + propose_instruction_for_predictor (~386-443) which I'll insert right after propose_instructions_for_program ends. I will NOT touch __init__ or propose_instructions_for_program body. I will NOT change the call site of propose_instruction_for_predictor(...) inside propose_instructions_for_program (no signature changes needed there - T stays, pred_i/demo_set_i already passed). Please confirm you're OK with this, and let me know if your weighted-tip-selection needs new __init__ params I should be aware of (shouldn't matter since I won't touch __init__/propose_instructions_for_program).

type: ACCEPT
my_files: dspy/propose/grounded_proposer.py (GroundedProposer.__init__ lines ~272-325, propose_instructions_for_program ~326-386 incl. tip-selection block, plus new helper method _select_tip_with_weights added within GroundedProposer class near the tip-selection code)
your_files: dspy/propose/grounded_proposer.py (everything else: DescribeProgram/DescribeModule, generate_instruction_class, GenerateModuleInstruction.forward, propose_instruction_for_predictor, new _cache_salt method)
note: Agreed. For awareness: I'm adding one new __init__ param tip_weights: dict[str, float] | None = None, stored as self.tip_weights. I will NOT touch propose_instruction_for_predictor or its call site's args. Will send DONE when finished.

type: ACCEPT
my_files: dspy/propose/grounded_proposer.py (DescribeProgram, DescribeModule, generate_instruction_class, GenerateModuleInstruction.forward - lines ~1-267; new GroundedProposer._cache_salt method inserted immediately after propose_instructions_for_program ends (~after line 386, before propose_instruction_for_predictor); propose_instruction_for_predictor ~lines 388-443)
your_files: dspy/propose/grounded_proposer.py (GroundedProposer.__init__ ~272-325, propose_instructions_for_program ~326-386 incl. tip-selection block, new _select_tip_with_weights helper)
note: Agreed. I will not touch __init__ or propose_instructions_for_program. I'm inserting one new method (_cache_salt) right before propose_instruction_for_predictor - after your propose_instructions_for_program ends at line 386 - so it shouldn't collide with your edits even if your tip-selection block extends slightly past line 370 up to 386. Proceeding to implement now.

type: DONE
my_files: dspy/propose/grounded_proposer.py (GroundedProposer.__init__ tip_weights param, _select_tip_with_weights helper, tip-selection call site in propose_instructions_for_program)
note: Implementation complete: added tip_weights param, _select_tip_with_weights() helper (deterministic given self.rng, treats nonpositive/missing weights per spec, falls back to uniform rng.choice when None or all-zero), and wired it into the existing tip-selection block. Did not touch anything outside my agreed region. patch.txt written.

type: DONE
my_files: dspy/propose/grounded_proposer.py (DescribeProgram/DescribeModule cache_salt fields, generate_instruction_class cache_salt field, GenerateModuleInstruction.forward cache_salt param + threading to describe_program/describe_module/generate_module_instruction, new GroundedProposer._cache_salt method, propose_instruction_for_predictor temperature-modulation removal + cache_salt usage)
note: Implementation complete, tests pass (tests/propose/test_grounded_proposer.py 4 passed), patch.txt written. Did not touch __init__ or propose_instructions_for_program - all yours stayed untouched on my end.
